rules.title: Display only relevant active issues

rules.title: Claimed issues are marked

rules.title: Default sort is by freshness
tests: tests/e2e/browse-issues.e2e.test.ts::browse-issues: issues sorted by freshness (newest first) by default

rules.title: No local claim tracking

rules.title: Already-claimed issues remain relevant but flagged
